description: Composition Peach Top made of blended fabric, has a V-neck, short sleeves and has a flap on the left chest to indicate pocket Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach Do not wring Use warm iron Spread the joy around you with this stylish Top from femella. The blended fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day long. Pair it with jeans and sandals for that perfect girly look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
